title: Povest o nastoyashchem cheloveke
actors: Pavel Kadochnikov, Nikolai Okhlopkov, Aleksei Dikij
plot: Alexey Meresyev was a fighter pilot during the war. One day he was shot down by Nazis, and because of his wounds both of his legs had to be cut off up to his knees. Because of his spirit and courage, Alexey was able to overcome hi...
